metadata.title: Aurasea | The Daily Intelligent Partner for Thai Small Business Owners
metadata.description: Aurasea builds operational intelligence software for Thai small business owners. Transform daily operations data into smart decisions, every morning.

hero.headline: The daily intelligent partner for Thai small business owners
hero.subheadline: Aurasea transforms your operational data into smart decisions, every morning

problem.title: Operational complexity, simplified
problem.p1: Thai small business owners navigate enormous daily complexity — sales, costs, staff, inventory, competitors — without tools that help them see the whole picture and act with confidence.
problem.p2: We built Aurasea because SMB owners deserve the same caliber of intelligence tools that large enterprises have always had.
problem.p3: Not just dashboards — a partner that tells you every morning what matters today.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: One platform, three products, built for Thai small businesses

auraseaos.title: Aurasea OS
auraseaos.description: Operational intelligence platform for SMB owners

founder.title: Why Aurasea
founder.intro: Aurasea is founded by an academic, financial professional, and business owner who deeply understands the challenges of Thai SMBs.
founder.bio: Bovorn Vichiansin is the founder of Aurasea. With a PhD in Economics, he previously held positions at the World Bank, Deloitte Consulting, and Merrill Lynch (Bank of America) in New York. He teaches at Chulalongkorn University's Finance program and manages Crystal Resort and Cafe — both serving as Aurasea's design partners. He built Aurasea because the operational tools available to Thai small business owners weren't keeping pace with what's possible with modern AI.

regional.title: Built in Thailand, for Southeast Asia
regional.p1: We're headquartered in Bangkok and build for Thailand first, then expand across Southeast Asia from 2027.
regional.p2: We understand that SMBs in this region operate on LINE more than email, in cash more than credit, and as family businesses more than startups. Our products are designed for that reality.

footerCta.title: Ready to transform how you run your business?
footerCta.subtitle: Discover how Aurasea can support your operations

story.title: The Founder's Story
story.p1: Bovorn Vichiansin began his academic journey in Electrical Engineering before pursuing graduate studies in Economics and Finance, ultimately earning his PhD.
story.p2: His career took him through global organizations — at the World Bank in Washington DC, then Deloitte Consulting and Merrill Lynch (Bank of America) in New York City, working in both the hedge fund and wealth management businesses.
story.p3: Returning to Thailand, he became a professor in Chulalongkorn University's Master of Financial Engineering program while overseeing Crystal Resort & Cafe (81 rooms).
story.p4: In running his own businesses, he saw a clear gap — the sophisticated tools available to large enterprises were inaccessible to typical SMBs. Aurasea was born to close that gap.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.p1: We believe Thai small business owners deserve world-class tools — not enterprise software stripped down for them.
mission.p2: We build products that start from a genuine understanding of small businesses in this region — how they operate, how they communicate, and the unique challenges they face.

name.title: Why 'Aurasea'
name.p1: Aurasea combines 'aura' (radiance) and 'sea' (ocean) — the radiance of light guiding through the vast ocean of business complexity.
name.p2: It reflects what we do — illuminating what matters most each day, so business owners can navigate with confidence.

location.title: Where We're Based
location.summary: We're headquartered in Bangkok, with active operations in Nakhon Ratchasima where Crystal Resort and our cafe serve as Aurasea's design partners.
location.headquarters: Headquarters: Bangkok — where our business operations, partnership conversations, and Chula MFE academic affiliations are based.
location.operations: Operations: Nakhon Ratchasima — where Crystal Resort and our cafe operate as Aurasea's design partners and dogfooding environments. Every feature ships first to production at these locations before reaching paying customers.
location.intent: This dual presence is intentional. Bangkok gives us access to Thailand's tech ecosystem, talent pool, and partnership networks. Nakhon Ratchasima gives us direct, daily exposure to the operational realities of running real SMBs — which keeps our product honest.

hero.title: Our Products
hero.subtitle: One platform, three products, for Thai small businesses

auraseaos.title: Aurasea OS
auraseaos.description: The core Aurasea platform that aggregates your business operations data and generates daily insights — sales summaries, cost analysis, alerts, and recommendations delivered to your LINE every morning.
auraseaos.audience: For: SMB owners who want a unified view of their operations

ratedesk.title: RateDesk.ai
ratedesk.description: AI-powered revenue management for independent hotels and resorts — recommends room rates, benchmarks competitors, and forecasts revenue. Integrates with Easyfo, Cloudbeds, SiteMinder, and more.
ratedesk.audience: For: Independent hotel and resort owners (30-150 rooms)
ratedesk.planNote: First 50 Founding Members — price locked for life + 90-day free trial

menudesk.title: MenuDesk.ai
menudesk.description: Operations intelligence for cafes, bakeries, and restaurants — menu engineering, ingredient cost tracking, waste management, and staff planning. Integrates with FoodStory, Loyverse, StoreHub.
menudesk.audience: For: Small to mid-sized cafes, bakeries, and restaurants

hero.title: Partner with Aurasea
hero.subtitle: Building value together for Thai small businesses

why.title: Why Partner with Us
why.p1: Aurasea is building a growing customer base of SMBs in Thailand. Partnership with us means access to a targeted customer network.
why.p2: We focus on technical excellence and great customer service, ensuring our partners earn meaningful returns from collaboration.
